options.name: -clock_factor
options.description: Specifies if the user-defined factor value is for clock

options.name: -data_factor
options.description: Specifies if the user-defined factor value is for data

options.name: -derate_cell
options.description: Applies user-specified scaling factors on cell delays

options.name: -derate_cell_check
options.description: Applies user-specified scaling factors on timing checks.

options.name: -derate_net
options.description: Applies user-specified scaling factors on net delays.

options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies the mode for which derate is to be reported.

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies the mode for which derate is to be reported.

options.name: -max_paths
options.description: Reports the specified number of worst paths in the design, regardless of the endpoint

options.name: -max_points
options.description: Reports the worst path it finds to each endpoint up to the number specified by the -max_points option

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Reports only those paths with slack equal to or less than the value of float are reported

options.name: -path_based_ssta
options.description: Enables generation of the statistical OCV factor using path based SSTA analysis.

options.name: -path_group
options.description: Considers only the path contained in the groups in the specified groupname_list for computing the statistical timing derate factor.

options.name: -type
options.description: {arrival_time_based slack_time_based} Specifies if the OCV factor needs to be generated using the arrival time or slack time approach. Default is arrival_time_based
